REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, YUAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRYDEN JD, ARTHUR L. MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-29-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NON-PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION FOR COURT ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED FEBRUARY 28, 2013 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF YUAN WILLIAMS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ARTHUR L. BRYDEN, J.D., AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NATIONAL MANAGEMENT GROUP INC. AND NATIONAL BENEFITS GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, IS VACATED AT THE REQUEST OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Order To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. NON-PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S Motion For Court Order To Vacate Judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and for good cause shown. The judgment entered February 28, 2013 in favor of Plaintiff Yuan Williams and against Defendant Arthur L. Bryden, J.D., an individual dba National Management Group Inc. and National Benefits Group, Inc., a California corporation, is vacated at the request of the Labor Commissioner. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
